ogTitle: Upper Dartbrook vs Upper Duroby: Climate Safety

heading: Upper Dartbrook vs Upper Duroby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Dartbrook, New South Wales and Upper Duroby, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Dartbrook has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Upper Duroby (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Dartbrook or Upper Duroby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Dartbrook has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Upper Duroby scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Dartbrook scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Duroby scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Dartbrook or Upper Duroby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Dartbrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
